nasb.text: All things came into being through Him, and apart from Him nothing came into being that has come into being.

esv.text: All things were made through him, and without him was not any thing made that was made.

cnv.text: 萬有是藉著他造的；凡被造的，沒有一樣不是藉著他造的。

ccb.text: 万物都是借着祂造的，受造之物没有一样不是借着祂造的。

csbs.text: 万有是藉着他而成的； 凡所成的， 没有一样不是藉着他而成的。
